title: address-listing
description: An address saved on an account, i.e. a physical address plus any additional account-specific metadata.

first_name.description: The first name of the person associated with this address.

last_name.description: The last name of the person associated with this address.

company.description: The company associated with this address.

street_address1.description: The street address associated with this address.

street_address2.description: Any additional, optional, street address information associated with this address.

locality.description: The locality (e.g. city, town, etc...) associated with this address.

postal_code.description: The postal code associated with this address.

region.description: The region or administrative area (e.g. state, province, county, etc...) associated with this address.

email.description: The email address associated with this address.

phone.description: The phone number associated with this address.

is_default.description: Whether or not this is the default address saved.
